hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

This strategy uses a volatility-based gate to filter out low volume market conditions and then combines the DMI and AO indicators for directional movement detection, followed by entry using a partial crossing of Bollinger Bands upper and lower bands along with RSI. The exit is based on a cross below ATR band or an angle oscillator violation.
The combination of ATR-based stop loss/take profit and DMI, AO and Fibonacci levels will provide a more robust trading signal.
